data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies navigation to reduce decision time.
data.technical_spec: Limits choices in menus and filters for user ease.

data.title: Fitts’ Law
data.description: Optimizes button sizes for interaction efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Large tappable areas for actions like liking and sharing.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhances user perception of functionality through design.
data.technical_spec: Adopts a minimalist design with a focus on photography.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Ensures consistency with widely used patterns.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes standard social media interactions like scrolling feed.

data.title: Feedback Principle
data.description: Provides visual or haptic responses for interactions.
data.technical_spec: Uses vibration for likes and visual animation for notifications.
